string.name: cover_letter_template
string.value:
Dear [Recruiter Name],

I came across your post and I am highly interested in the opportunity at [Company Name].

I have experience in Full Stack development with React, Next.js, TypeScript, and Node.js. I am a quick learner and I can easily mold into your tech stack to start contributing effectively.

You can view my resume here: https://drive.google.com/file/d/1bjhBnMVeGDNWFr7yFraxt7_l_I1Ivyf9/view?usp=sharing I would appreciate the opportunity to connect and discuss how I could be a fit for your team.

Best regards,
Bibhuti

parameters.bodyParametersJson:
={"model": "qwen/qwen3.6-27b", "messages": [{"role": "user", "content": {{ JSON.stringify("Analyze the following LinkedIn post and determine if it is a recruiter or company advertising an actual job vacancy, OR if it's just a candidate looking for a job or sharing general advice.

LinkedIn Post by " + $json.recruiter_name + ":
" + $json.post_text + "

Reply ONLY with the word "YES" if it is a real job vacancy, or "NO" if it is not.") }} }], "temperature": 0.1}

string.name: prompt_text
string.value:
=You are a professional assistant helping me apply for jobs. Below is my cover letter template:
---
{{ $('Define Configuration').item.json.cover_letter_template }}
---

Here is the details of a LinkedIn post:
Recruiter Name: {{ $('Split In Batches').all(0, $runIndex)[0].json.recruiter_name }}
Company Name: {{ $('Split In Batches').all(0, $runIndex)[0].json.company || 'their company' }}
Job Posting:
{{ $('Split In Batches').all(0, $runIndex)[0].json.post_text }}

Please analyze the post to understand the core requirements, and then tailor my cover letter template to fit this job posting.
Instructions:
1. Address the recruiter by name (use '{{ $('Split In Batches').all(0, $runIndex)[0].json.recruiter_name }}' if it is a real person's name, otherwise 'Hiring Team').
2. Mention 1-2 specific technologies or requirements from the post, but DO NOT boast or exaggerate my skills. Keep the tone humble.
3. Emphasize that I am a quick learner who can easily mold into their specific tech stack.
4. Keep the cover letter concise (under 250 words) and highly professional.
5. You MUST output your response as a valid JSON object with exactly two keys: "analysis" and "cover_letter".
Example:
{
  "analysis": "Your brief analysis of the job requirements",
  "cover_letter": "Your final tailored cover letter"
}
